view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link upon booking confirmation. This is explicitly stated in the scenario where the client books an appointment, and the confirmation email includes the generated Zoom link. The successful execution of prior steps leading to this outcome further supports the validation of the requirement.
